title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback

defines.name: Constitutional AI
defines.definition: A training framework that uses a written constitution of principles plus AI self-critiques and AI preference judgments to train a more harmless assistant with minimal human supervision.

problem: Training helpful AI assistants to be harmless and non-evasive is difficult when relying on human labels for harmfulness, and existing methods create tension between helpfulness and harmlessness.
